arbitrary-send-erc20.description: MockYieldAdapter.invest(uint256) (src/mocks/MockYieldAdapter.sol#127-143) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: _asset.safeTransferFrom(_vault,address(this),assets) (src/mocks/MockYieldAdapter.sol#134)

arbitrary-send-eth.description:
CampaignRegistry.approveCampaign(bytes32,address) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#413-438) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- (success,None) = proposer.call{value: depositAmount}() (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#431)

assembly.description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) uses assembly
	- INLINE ASM (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#227-234)
	- INLINE ASM (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#240-249)

cache-array-length.description: Loop condition i < adapterList.length (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#513) should use cached array length instead of referencing `length` member of the storage array.
Loop condition i < adapterList.length (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#447) should use cached array length instead of referencing `length` member of the storage array.

dead-code.description: VaultTokenBase._setACLManager(address) (src/vault/VaultTokenBase.sol#147-152) is never used and should be removed

divide-before-multiply.description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#265)

GrowthAdapter.divest(uint256) (src/adapters/kinds/GrowthAdapter.sol#94-114) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- normalized = (assets * 1e18) / growthIndex (src/adapters/kinds/GrowthAdapter.sol#96)
	- returned = (normalized * growthIndex) / 1e18 (src/adapters/kinds/GrowthAdapter.sol#107)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- low = low / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#245)
	- result = low * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#272)

Math.invMod(uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#315-361) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- quotient = gcd / remainder (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#337)
	- (gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#339-346)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#263)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#261)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#266)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#264)

Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#262)

incorrect-exp.description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)

solc-version.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.22 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.22 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/proxy/ERC1967/ERC1967Proxy.sol#4)
	- ^0.8.22 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/proxy/ERC1967/ERC1967Utils.sol#4)

	- ^0.8.22 (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#4)

Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.

incorrect-equality.description:
AaveAdapter.divest(uint256) (src/adapters/AaveAdapter.sol#229-262) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- aTokenBalance == 0 (src/adapters/AaveAdapter.sol#233)

MockAavePool.accrueYield(address,uint256) (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#218-236) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- scaledSupply == 0 (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#228)

AaveAdapter.emergencyWithdraw() (src/adapters/AaveAdapter.sol#308-328) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- aTokenBalance == 0 (src/adapters/AaveAdapter.sol#315)

CampaignRegistry.finalizeStakeExit(bytes32,address,uint256) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#672-711) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- stake.pendingWithdrawal == 0 (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#688)

GiveVault4626.emergencyWithdrawUser(uint256,address,address) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#458-494) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- assets == 0 (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#482)

low-level-calls.description:
Low level call in Address.functionCallWithValue(address,bytes,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#75-81):
	- (success,returndata) = target.call{value: value}(data) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#79)

Low level call in Address.sendValue(address,uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#33-42):
	- (success,returndata) = recipient.call{value: amount}() (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#38)

Low level call in GiveVault4626.withdrawETH(uint256,address,address,uint256) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#689-712):
	- (ok,None) = address(receiver).call{value: assets}() (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#708)

Low level call in CampaignRegistry.approveCampaign(bytes32,address) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#413-438):
	- (success,None) = proposer.call{value: depositAmount}() (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#431)

Low level call in Address.functionStaticCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#87-90):
	- (success,returndata) = target.staticcall(data) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol#88)

Low level call in GiveVault4626.redeemETH(uint256,address,address,uint256) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#664-687):
	- (ok,None) = address(receiver).call{value: assets}() (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#683)

missing-zero-check.description:
CampaignRegistry.approveCampaign(bytes32,address).proposer (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#427) lacks a zero-check on :
		- (success,None) = proposer.call{value: depositAmount}() (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#431)

MockAToken.constructor(address,uint8,address).asset (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#274) lacks a zero-check on :
		- UNDERLYING_ASSET = asset (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#275)

MockAToken.constructor(address,uint8,address).pool (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#274) lacks a zero-check on :
		- POOL = pool (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#276)

calls-loop.description:
StrategyManager._findBestAdapter() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#441-465) has external calls inside a loop: assets = IYieldAdapter(adapter).totalAssets() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#453-461)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		StrategyManager.checkAndRebalance()
		StrategyManager._performRebalance()

StrategyManager._findBestAdapter() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#441-465) has external calls inside a loop: assets = IYieldAdapter(adapter).totalAssets() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#453-461)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		StrategyManager.rebalance()
		StrategyManager._performRebalance()

naming-convention.description: Function ERC4626Upgradeable.__ERC4626_init(IERC20) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/ERC4626Upgradeable.sol#92-94) is not in mixedCase
Constant ERC4626Upgradeable.ERC4626StorageLocation (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/ERC4626Upgradeable.sol#61) is not in UPPER_CASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES
Variable MockAToken.UNDERLYING_ASSET (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#255) is not in mixedCase
Variable UUPSUpgradeable.__self (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#21) is not in mixedCase
Constant ERC20Upgradeable.ERC20StorageLocation (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20Upgradeable.sol#44) is not in UPPER_CASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES
Function UUPSUpgradeable.__UUPSUpgradeable_init() (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#65-66) is not in mixedCase

reentrancy-balance.description:
Reentrancy in GiveVault4626._ensureSufficientCash(uint256) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#516-533):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- returned = IYieldAdapter(adapterAddr).divest(shortfall) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#526)
	Balance read before the call:
	- currentCash = IERC20(asset()).balanceOf(address(this)) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#518)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- loss > maxLoss (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#531)
		- stale variable `loss`

timestamp.description:
PayoutRouter.isFeeChangeReady(uint256) (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#310-313) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- change.exists && block.timestamp >= change.effectiveTimestamp (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#312)

CampaignRegistry.finalizeStakeExit(bytes32,address,uint256) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#672-711) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- stake.pendingWithdrawal == 0 (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#688)

MockAavePool.withdraw(address,uint256,address) (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#145-169) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(amountToWithdraw <= userBalance,Insufficient aToken balance) (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#158)

CampaignRegistry.rejectCampaign(bytes32,string) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#448-469) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- depositAmount > 0 (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#462)

CampaignRegistry.finalizeCheckpoint(bytes32,uint256) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#863-903) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp <= checkpoint.votingEndsAt (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#869)

MockAavePool.accrueYield(address,uint256) (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#218-236) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- scaledSupply == 0 (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#228)

GiveVault4626.emergencyPause() (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#384-401) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- adapterAddr != address(0) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#393)

StrategyManager.checkAndRebalance() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#338-343) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp < lastRebalanceTime + rebalanceInterval (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#340)

StrategyManager.isRebalanceDue() (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#556-558) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- autoRebalanceEnabled && ! emergencyMode && block.timestamp >= lastRebalanceTime + rebalanceInterval (src/manager/StrategyManager.sol#557)

CampaignRegistry.voteOnCheckpoint(bytes32,uint256,bool) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#819-853) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp < checkpoint.votingStartsAt || block.timestamp > checkpoint.votingEndsAt (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#825)
	- block.timestamp < stake.stakeTimestamp + MIN_STAKE_DURATION (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#838)

GiveVault4626.emergencyWithdrawUser(uint256,address,address) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#458-494) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp < cfg.emergencyActivatedAt + EMERGENCY_GRACE_PERIOD (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#468)

MockAavePool._updateLiquidityIndex(address) (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#181-188) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- reserve.lastUpdateTimestamp != block.timestamp (src/mocks/MockAavePool.sol#185)

CampaignRegistry.approveCampaign(bytes32,address) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#413-438) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- depositAmount > 0 (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#429)

PayoutRouter.executeFeeChange(uint256) (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#247-275) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp < change.effectiveTimestamp (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#255)

NGORegistry.executeCurrentNGOChange() (src/donation/NGORegistry.sol#419-430) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp < s.currentNGOChangeETA (src/donation/NGORegistry.sol#422)

too-many-digits.description:
Math.log2(uint256) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#612-651) uses literals with too many digits:
	- r = r | byte(uint256,uint256)(x >> r,0x0000010102020202030303030303030300000000000000000000000000000000) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#649)

unindexed-event-address.description: Event Pausable.Unpaused(address) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Pausable.sol#28) has address parameters but no indexed parameters
Event Pausable.Paused(address) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Pausable.sol#23) has address parameters but no indexed parameters
Event IERC1967.AdminChanged(address,address) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC1967.sol#18) has address parameters but no indexed parameters
Event PausableUpgradeable.Unpaused(address) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/utils/PausableUpgradeable.sol#41) has address parameters but no indexed parameters
Event PausableUpgradeable.Paused(address) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/utils/PausableUpgradeable.sol#36) has address parameters but no indexed parameters

uninitialized-local.description: StrategyRegistry.unregisterStrategyVault(bytes32,address).removed (src/registry/StrategyRegistry.sol#336) is a local variable never initialized
EmergencyModule._emergencyWithdraw(GiveTypes.VaultConfig,bytes32,address,bytes).params (src/modules/EmergencyModule.sol#188) is a local variable never initialized

unprotected-upgrade.description: NGORegistry (src/donation/NGORegistry.sol#47-536) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: NGORegistry.initialize(address) (src/donation/NGORegistry.sol#192-195). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#86-89)

CampaignRegistry (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#53-1071) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: CampaignRegistry.initialize(address,address) (src/registry/CampaignRegistry.sol#354-360). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

StrategyRegistry (src/registry/StrategyRegistry.sol#39-412) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: StrategyRegistry.initialize(address) (src/registry/StrategyRegistry.sol#187-190). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

GiveProtocolCore (src/core/GiveProtocolCore.sol#62-355) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: GiveProtocolCore.initialize(address) (src/core/GiveProtocolCore.sol#130-143). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

CampaignVault4626 (src/vault/CampaignVault4626.sol#38-165) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: GiveVault4626.initialize(address,string,string,address,address,address) (src/vault/GiveVault4626.sol#176-209)CampaignVault4626.initialize(address,string,string,address,address,address,address) (src/vault/CampaignVault4626.sol#83-100). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

PayoutRouter (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#20-591) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: PayoutRouter.initialize(address,address,address,address,address,uint256) (src/payout/PayoutRouter.sol#96-130). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

ACLManager (src/governance/ACLManager.sol#28-493) is an upgradeable contract that does not protect its initialize functions: ACLManager.initialize(address,address) (src/governance/ACLManager.sol#174-187). Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#86-89)

Anyone can delete the contract with: UUPSUpgradeable.upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes) (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol#92-95)

available_detectors.name: arbitrary-send-erc20-permit
available_detectors.description: transferFrom uses arbitrary from with permit

available_detectors.name: arbitrary-send-eth
available_detectors.description: Functions that send Ether to arbitrary destinations

available_detectors.name: cache-array-length
available_detectors.description: Detects `for` loops that use `length` member of some storage array in their loop condition and don't modify it.

available_detectors.name: chainlink-feed-registry
available_detectors.description: Detect when chainlink feed registry is used

available_detectors.name: chronicle-unchecked-price
available_detectors.description: Detect when Chronicle price is not checked.

available_detectors.name: pragma
available_detectors.description: If different pragma directives are used

available_detectors.name: constable-states
available_detectors.description: State variables that could be declared constant

available_detectors.name: immutable-states
available_detectors.description: State variables that could be declared immutable

available_detectors.name: cyclomatic-complexity
available_detectors.description: Detects functions with high (> 11) cyclomatic complexity

available_detectors.name: delegatecall-loop
available_detectors.description: Payable functions using `delegatecall` inside a loop

available_detectors.name: domain-separator-collision
available_detectors.description: Detects ERC20 tokens that have a function whose signature collides with EIP-2612's DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()

available_detectors.name: external-function
available_detectors.description: Public function that could be declared external

available_detectors.name: gelato-unprotected-randomness
available_detectors.description: Call to _requestRandomness within an unprotected function

available_detectors.name: incorrect-return
available_detectors.description: If a `return` is incorrectly used in assembly mode.

available_detectors.name: incorrect-using-for
available_detectors.description: Detects using-for statement usage when no function from a given library matches a given type

available_detectors.name: mapping-deletion
available_detectors.description: Deletion on mapping containing a structure

available_detectors.name: incorrect-modifier
available_detectors.description: Modifiers that can return the default value

available_detectors.name: optimism-deprecation
available_detectors.description: Detect when deprecated Optimism predeploy or function is used.

available_detectors.name: variable-scope
available_detectors.description: Local variables used prior their declaration

available_detectors.name: pyth-unchecked-confidence
available_detectors.description: Detect when the confidence level of a Pyth price is not checked

available_detectors.name: pyth-unchecked-publishtime
available_detectors.description: Detect when the publishTime of a Pyth price is not checked

available_detectors.name: reentrancy-balance
available_detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities leading to outdated balance checks

available_detectors.name: reentrancy-events
available_detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities leading to out-of-order Events

available_detectors.name: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
available_detectors.description: Reentrancy vulnerabilities through send and transfer

available_detectors.name: return-bomb
available_detectors.description: A low level callee may consume all callers gas unexpectedly.

available_detectors.name: return-leave
available_detectors.description: If a `return` is used instead of a `leave`.

available_detectors.name: shadowing-abstract
available_detectors.description: State variables shadowing from abstract contracts

available_detectors.name: incorrect-shift
available_detectors.description: The order of parameters in a shift instruction is incorrect.

available_detectors.name: storage-array
available_detectors.description: Signed storage integer array compiler bug

available_detectors.name: suicidal
available_detectors.description: Functions allowing anyone to destruct the contract

available_detectors.name: tautological-compare
available_detectors.description: Comparing a variable to itself always returns true or false, depending on comparison

available_detectors.name: too-many-digits
available_detectors.description: Conformance to numeric notation best practices

available_detectors.name: unindexed-event-address
available_detectors.description: Events with address parameters but no indexed parameters

available_detectors.name: uninitialized-fptr-cst
available_detectors.description: Uninitialized function pointer calls in constructors

available_detectors.name: var-read-using-this
available_detectors.description: Contract reads its own variable using `this`
